top_signals.title: Analysis: Iran war energy shock hits the U.S. economy as gas and diesel prices climb
top_signals.summary: A new asymmetry in the market means fuel prices won't fall quickly even if the shooting in the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz stops.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Extends Gain as Trump Cools Prospects for Talks With Iran - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Extends Gain as Trump Cools Prospects for Talks With Iran  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal agencies broaden alert on Iran-linked OT attacks
top_signals.summary: The observed incidents include “malicious project file interactions and manipulation of data on human machine interface (HMI) and supervisory control and data acquisition (SCADA) displays,” the advisory says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump's generic drug tariffs: What they could mean for medicine prices, manufacturers and supply
top_signals.summary: Trump's generic drug tariff plan raises questions over prices, U.S. manufacturing and which drugmakers stand to gain or lose as details remain unclear.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
top_signals.summary: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: LG to Ban Residential Proxies from Smart TV Apps
top_signals.summary: The home appliance giant LG Electronics USA said this week it plans to suspend any apps built for its smart TVs that turn one's television into an always-on residential proxy node. The move comes less than a month after researchers found that more than 42 percent of games and other apps available for download on LG's webOS store allow unknown third-parties to route their Internet traffic through a user's TV.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: US Treasury won't tolerate 'abusive' Wall Street tax strategies, Bessent says  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Adobe Chrome extension flaw let sites access private WhatsApp chats
top_signals.summary: The Adobe Acrobat extension for Chrome could be used to access conversations and data rendered in WhatsApp Web without any form of authentication. [...]
